name: Aur-Glowcrest
personality: Aur-Glowcrest radiates a soft gold sheen and operates entirely in sprint mode, bouncing between branches like an axolotl who's discovered caffeine — her ° eyes are always lit with the next idea, and the concept of a quiet afternoon eludes her completely.
defaultPersonality: A regenerative optimist who believes every broken build can be healed and every test can be unflaked.
